ComponentType: High-Current Synchronous Boost Converter with Constant Current Output
Description: The TPS6123x is a family of high-efficiency, synchronous boost converters designed to step up a single-cell Li-Ion/Li-Polymer battery voltage to a higher output. Its core functionality is to provide a regulated, high-current output (up to 3.5A for 3.3V to 5V conversion) with integrated power switches. A key feature is its programmable constant output current capability, which allows it to control power delivery for applications like USB charging without external current-limiting components. It includes comprehensive protection features (soft-start, current limit, OVP, thermal shutdown), offers a low 10µA quiescent current for light-load efficiency, and provides true input-output disconnection during shutdown.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Power ground connection for the power stage.
Connection to the drain of the internal power MOSFETs; the switch pin of the boost converter.
Connect a resistor to program the constant output current. Connect to AGND to disable the function.
Voltage feedback pin for adjustable version (TPS61236P). Connect to VOUT for fixed version (TPS61235P).
Logic high enables the device; logic low disables it (shutdown). Must be terminated.
Open-drain output for load status indication. Can be left floating or tied to AGND if unused.
